name: Crockpot Roast
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 potatoes, pared and thinly sliced
2 to 3 carrots, pared and thinly sliced
3 to 4 pounds brisket, rump roast, or pot roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Season the meat with salt and pepper, then add it to the pot.
3. Add the liquid.
4. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours (high: 5 to 6 hours).
5. Remove the meat and vegetables using a spatula.
6. Thicken for gravy if desired.
7. Without vegetables: season the roast with salt, pepper, and any other favorite seasonings. Add no liquid. Cook as directed.
